dealSummary: Sarvam, an Indian startup developing AI large language models, raised a $234 million Series B at a $1.5 billion valuation led by HCLTech and Bessemer Venture Partners.

company: Hydra Host, developer of a marketplace for GPU compute
dealSummary: Miami-based Hydra Host, developer of a marketplace for GPU compute, secured a $100 million Series A led by Kindred Ventures.
NewCore, an agentic AI security startup based in Tel Aviv, raised $66 million in new funding led by Cyberstarts.
Arcade, a San Francisco-based specialist building an AI physical creation platform, received a $60 million Series A led by SYN Ventures.
Cellares, a biotech startup focused on developing cell therapies, raised an additional $50 million for its Series D from Prime Radiant Partners.
Interchecks, a New York-based fintech focused on payments, secured a $50 million Series C led by Bettor Capital, Commerce Ventures, Decades Holdings and Thayer Street Partners.
leadInvestors: Bettor Capital, Commerce Ventures, Decades Holdings, Thayer Street Partners

dealSummary: San Francisco-based Radical Numerics, an AI lab focused on biological research, raised $50 million in seed funding led by Emergence Capital.
Orbio AI, a Spanish provider of an AI-native HR system, secured a $21 million Series A led by Dawn Capital.
